hook.summary: Introduction of a new 'Warrior' character class with tribal-themed art and stats.
hook.visual_action: A character profile card for a 'Warrior' is shown with skill icons and attributes.
hook.text_overlay: Warrior, Personality: Mysterious and pround, Gift: 100% of affinity for pets, Tribe: Forest, NEW PROFESSION ONLINE, SSR

scene_flow: Initial reveal of the Warrior character profile card with personality and tribe details.
Subtle zoom effect highlighting the character's tribal design and skill icons.
Focus on the 'SSR' rarity tag and 'NEW PROFESSION ONLINE' announcement at the bottom.
audience_proxy: Fans of anime-style RPGs and character collection games interested in new class releases.
